cases.title: Participant browses first page of discoverable events with default pagination
preconditions: At least three events in participant-visible states (e.g. RegistrationOpen)
Events seeded with distinct startAt values for sort verification
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1 with Participant Authorization bearer
Inspect response envelope and first item fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope (items, page=1, pageSize=12, total, totalPages); items.length <= 12; items sorted by startAt ascending per default sort; each item includes eventId, name, state, startAt, location, and coverImageUrl when set; satisfies FR-28 browse paginated event listings and FR-31 total count metadata

cases.title: Participant navigates to page 2 of event browse list
preconditions: At least 13 participant-visible events (exceeds default pageSize of 12)
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc and record total and totalPages
GET /api/v1/events?page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
Compare page-2 items to expected second slice ordered by startAt ascending
cases.expected: Page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=12, total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/12), items are the correct contiguous slice per testing plan Events list page 2 scenario and AC-13

cases.title: Participant searches event browse list by name via q parameter
preconditions: Discoverable event named uniquely (e.g. Campus Workshop Alpha)
Additional discoverable events seeded with different names
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=Campus+Workshop+Alpha&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
Verify all returned items match search intent
cases.expected: HTTP 200; items include the matching event by name; non-matching discoverable events excluded; search q parameter filters participant browse list per API design GET /events and page list browse with search

cases.title: Participant filters event browse list by state
preconditions: Seeded events in RegistrationOpen and RegistrationClosed states visible to participants
steps: GET /api/v1/events?state=RegistrationOpen&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?state=RegistrationClosed&page=1&pageSize=12 with same token
cases.expected: RegistrationOpen filter returns only events with state RegistrationOpen; RegistrationClosed filter returns only RegistrationClosed events; optional state filter on GET /events supports participant browse basic filters per page list and API paginated list endpoints table

cases.title: Combined search, state filter, and pagination on event browse
preconditions: Multiple RegistrationOpen events containing 'workshop' in name plus RegistrationOpen events without that term
At least 13 RegistrationOpen events matching q=workshop to exceed one page
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=workshop&state=RegistrationOpen&page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
GET /api/v1/events?q=workshop&state=RegistrationOpen&page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
cases.expected: Both responses apply search and state filter before paging; total reflects filtered row count not full catalog; page-2 items are correct slice of filtered set; demonstrates FR-28 browse with search and filter together

cases.title: Participant event discovery page renders paginated card grid with search and filters
preconditions: Web app running with at least 13 discoverable seeded events
At least one event has cover image uploaded
Participant authenticated on event discovery browse route
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery browse list
Verify search input and basic state filter controls are visible
Confirm paginated card grid shows at most 12 cards with cover thumbnail or fallback illustration
Use Next pagination control to advance to page 2
cases.expected: Browse list displays search and basic filters, availability/registration status on cards, paginated card grid (16:9 cover or fallback), and pagination below grid; page change fetches next server page per page list event discovery, common UI pagination contract, and AC-14 server-driven listing

cases.title: Changing search or filter criteria resets browse list to page 1
preconditions: Participant on event discovery browse page currently viewing page 2
steps: Navigate to page 2 of event browse list
Enter a search term in the search input and submit or debounce trigger
Observe resulting page index and network request parameters
Clear search, apply a state filter, and observe page reset again
cases.expected: Each search or filter change resets pagination to page 1 and issues GET /events with page=1 and updated q or state parameters; matches common UI pagination rule and page list requirement that changing filters resets to page 1

cases.title: Event discovery card renders browse metadata with state badge and detail link
preconditions: Sample event props: name, state RegistrationOpen, startAt, location, optional coverImageUrl
steps: Render event card with RegistrationOpen fixture
Assert visible name, timing, location, state badge, and link to event detail
cases.expected: Card markup exposes discoverable event summary fields and navigation to detail; supports participant browse list card grid per page list and backlog component test requirement event-card.test.tsx

cases.title: Event list service returns paginated envelope with correct total for participant browse
preconditions: Known count of participant-visible events (e.g. 15 total)
PostgreSQL test database with seeded events
steps: Invoke eventService.listEvents(participantContext, { page: 1, pageSize: 12 })
Compare items.length, total, and totalPages to seeded row count
cases.expected: Service returns paginated result with total=15, totalPages=2, items.length=12 on page 1; total reflects full matching count before paging per integration target paginated list queries and FR-31

cases.title: Search with no matching events returns empty items with valid pagination metadata
preconditions: Discoverable events seeded with names not containing 'zzznomatch'
steps: GET /api/v1/events?q=zzznomatch&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=0 (or equivalent), page=1, pageSize=12; empty search result is a valid browse outcome with intact envelope

cases.title: Event browse page beyond last page returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Five participant-visible events seeded (totalPages=1 at pageSize 12)
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and record totalPages
GET /api/v1/events?page={totalPages+1}&pageSize=12
cases.expected: Page beyond totalPages returns items: [] with unchanged total, totalPages, page, and pageSize per AC-13 paginated list boundary behavior for participant event browse

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on event browse return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=0&pageSize=12 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=101 with Participant token
GET /api/v1/events?page=abc&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_PAGINATION; no partial event data returned; pagination contract enforces page >= 1 and pageSize max 100

cases.title: Invalid state filter value on event browse is rejected or ignored safely
steps: GET /api/v1/events?state=NotARealState&page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
cases.expected: Request returns HTTP 400 with validation error or HTTP 200 with empty items; must not return events in unintended states or crash; invalid filter input handled per strict input validation API principle

cases.title: Empty browse result shows empty state when search or filter matches no events
preconditions: Participant on event discovery browse page
steps: Enter search term that matches no events
Submit search and wait for list update
cases.expected: Card grid region shows empty state messaging (not an error page); pagination reflects zero total or hides appropriately; user can clear search to restore results per common UI table/card empty state contract

cases.title: Unauthenticated event browse API request returns 401
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 without credentials
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with typed error envelope; unauthenticated access to protected GET /events rejected per AC-15 and auth required for non-public endpoints

cases.title: Event browse returns single paginated page not full catalog in one response
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 with Participant token
Verify items.length and total fields
cases.expected: Response contains at most 12 items while total reflects full matching row count; client receives one page at a time per NFR-05 and AC-14 (no unbounded full-catalog payload in a single call)

cases.title: Large participant-visible event catalog browse returns one page within acceptable response time
preconditions: PostgreSQL test database per integration test setup
steps: Invoke paginated GET /events equivalent query for page 1 pageSize 12
Measure end-to-end query latency for single page fetch
cases.expected: Single page returned with correct total count; response time within acceptable threshold when total exceeds 500 rows per NFR-16; query uses events.start_at index for default sort

cases.title: Event browse page change triggers single paginated API request not full dataset load
preconditions: Participant on event discovery browse page with network inspection available
steps: Load page 1 and record GET /events request with page=1
Click Next to page 2
Verify only one new GET /events request with page=2 is issued
cases.expected: Page navigation fetches exactly one server page per interaction; no client-side slicing of a previously loaded full catalog per AC-14, NFR-05, and listing pages server-driven pagination tech stack guidance
